final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] in0,
    input [3:0] in1,
    input [3:0] in2,
    input [3:0] in3,
    input sel0,
    input sel1,
    output [3:0] out
    );assign out = sel1 & sel0 ? in3 : sel1 & ~sel0 ? in2 : ~sel1 & sel0 ? in1 : in0;
  wire [3:0] _tap_in0 = in0 & {4{1'b1}};

    
endmodule
